citations.title: Build a bento layout with CSS grid
Gemini can now operate your computer
Apple unveils next‑generation Siri AI at WWDC 2026

design_plan: Cinematic editorial blog with a restrained hero, Satoshi-based typography, and a responsive CSS Grid bento layout using grid-auto-flow: dense to avoid gaps. Subtle GSAP scroll motion guarded for no-JS/CDN failure. Clear AIDA flow: lead analysis, market signals, source cards, and a Super positioning CTA.
headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

site_brief.audience: buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents
site_brief.goal: Create a frequently refreshed editorial blog homepage with a lead analysis, short posts, source cards, and a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching makes repeated agent work cheaper and better.
site_brief.title: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: A continuously refreshed editorial brief for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents and computer‑use assistants. We analyze what’s new across Gemini, ChatGPT, Grok, Siri, Folk, and Orchids — and explain why Super’s computer‑use cache makes repeated workflows cheaper and more reliable.
